title: Find My Device - User location on the map
scenario: Verify user location is displayed on the map with correct zoom-dependent styling on Android (blue dot/circle) and iOS (blue dot/white circle) when accessing Find My Device from the App Menu.
steps: Start the app with headset connected or disconnected.
If prompted, allow GPS location access.
Observe the user's location on the map.
expected: The user's location should be displayed on the map. On Android, a full blue dot is shown when zoomed out, and a blue circle with a full blue dot in the center when zoomed in. On iOS, a full blue dot is shown when zoomed out, and a white circle when zoomed in.
